summary: Poorly received performance with no noted recording strengths
review: The sole review criticizes the concert as a dull, slow‑paced first set and a “basic” second set, offering no commentary on the audio quality. Without any positive remarks or technical details, the recording remains uncharacterized beyond its filename.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, strongly negative review; no information on recording quality, so rating is based mainly on the poor show assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound quality or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer found the first set overly slow and the second set basic, indicating a lackluster overall flow.
